case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO vs. M. ALIOTO SEAFOODS, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: CASE 156312 INVOLVES A DIFFERENT SEAWALL LOT THAN CASE 156311.
